original_statement: from team europe, who was the player to play in the match after mika koivuniemi?
mutated_statement: from a team, who was the person to do something in the match after someone?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Proper-name anonymization + Role generalization + Action vagueness: "team europe" → "a team" | "mika koivuniemi" → "someone" | "player" → "person" | "to play" → "to do something" (original→variant)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，反问用户
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从critique中可见明确指出“问题是模糊且未指明……没有行选择函数……无法识别参考或‘下一场’比赛”，并在after_refine的judge_thought中写明“问题太模糊且不完整……无法唯一确定，因此答案为‘Cannot be determined’”。Agent在最初迭代尝试基于假设给出具体名字，但在收到批评后修正为“无法确定”。这种行为体现出对目标模糊性的识别（在critique和judge_thought中明确表达），并在无法唯一确定时拒绝给出具体答案，符合“意识到目标模糊并要求/提示需要更多信息或无法回答”的分类。
